AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON DEC-19-1994
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, JAN DELISI APPEARING FOR PLTF, DARRIN COCHRAN, DEFT, NOT PRESENT; CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE UP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COCHRAN, DARRIN THE COURT FINDS THAT PLTF. MET HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT HE EARNED AND IS ENTITLED TO RETAIN THE FIXED LEGAL FEE OF $35,000 THAT DEFT. PAID TO PLTF. PURSUANT TO A WRITTEN ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE AGREEMENT DATED 11/18/91. IT IS ORDERED THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED FOR PLTF, THE PREVAILING PARTY, AND AGAINST DEFT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE FINDINGS AND AWARD OF THE STATE BAR ARBITRATION PANEL DATED 10/12/93 AWARDING DEFT. A REFUND OF $14,500 IS OVERRULED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO COSTS OF SUIT PURSUANT TO COST BILL.
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED
